meaning: n.即席演出,即兴曲adj.即席的adv.即席地,未经准备地
examples: "This was an impromptu affair," explained the Rat.
This afternoon the Palestinians held an impromptu press conference.
Security forces at a impromptu checkpoint marked by a small minibus wave us by.
Here, musicians often perform impromptu jam sessions while couples dance either the chacarera or zamba.
The space agency never before staged such a fast, impromptu spacewalk for a station crew.
